initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT i_item_sk
FROM store_sales, web_sales, date_dim, item
WHERE store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
  AND store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  AND web_sales.ws_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
  AND web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  AND date_dim.d_month_seq = 1200
  AND date_dim.d_month_seq >= 1200
  AND date_dim.d_month_seq <= 1200
GROUP BY i_item_sk
LIMIT 100

SELECT DISTINCT i_item_sk
FROM store_sales, web_sales, date_dim, item
WHERE store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
  AND store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  AND web_sales.ws_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
  AND web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  AND date_dim.d_month_seq = 1200
GROUP BY i_item_sk
LIMIT 100

SELECT DISTINCT i_item_sk
FROM store_sales, web_sales, date_dim, item
WHERE store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
  AND store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  AND web_sales.ws_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
  AND web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  AND date_dim.d_month_seq = 1200
GROUP BY i_item_sk
LIMIT 100

SELECT DISTINCT item.i_item_sk
FROM store_sales
JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
WHERE date_dim.d_month_seq = 1200
INTERSECT
SELECT DISTINCT item.i_item_sk
FROM web_sales
JOIN date_dim ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
JOIN item ON web_sales.ws_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
WHERE date_dim.d_month_seq = 1200
LIMIT 100

SELECT DISTINCT i_item_sk
FROM store_sales, web_sales, date_dim, item
WHERE store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
  AND store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  AND web_sales.ws_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
  AND web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  AND date_dim.d_month_seq = 1200
  AND date_dim.d_month_seq >= 1200
  AND date_dim.d_month_seq <= 1200
GROUP BY i_item_sk
LIMIT 100

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT item.i_item_sk
FROM store_sales
JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
WHERE date_dim.d_month_seq = 1200
  AND item.i_item_sk IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT item.i_item_sk
    FROM web_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN item ON web_sales.ws_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    WHERE date_dim.d_month_seq = 1200
  )
LIMIT 100

candidates.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT i_item_sk
FROM store_sales
JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
JOIN web_sales ON web_sales.ws_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
  AND web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE date_dim.d_month_seq = 1200
GROUP BY i_item_sk
LIMIT 100

SELECT DISTINCT item.i_item_sk
FROM store_sales
JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
WHERE date_dim.d_month_seq = 1200
AND item.i_item_sk IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT item.i_item_sk
  FROM web_sales
  JOIN date_dim ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  JOIN item ON web_sales.ws_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
  WHERE date_dim.d_month_seq = 1200
)
LIMIT 100

SELECT DISTINCT item.i_item_sk
FROM store_sales
JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
WHERE date_dim.d_month_seq = 1200
  AND item.i_item_sk IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT item.i_item_sk
    FROM web_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN item ON web_sales.ws_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    WHERE date_dim.d_month_seq = 1200
  )
LIMIT 100
